page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.16xlarge is a storage and memory-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6763P-C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz. The instance is configured with 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs, maintaining a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. It includes 512.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

A primary characteristic of this instance is its massive local storage capacity, consisting of 30,717 GB of local SSD storage. This high-density local storage is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 160 Gbps, enabling rapid data transfer rates. The instance does not include any GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.i5e.16xlarge offers high resource density by combining substantial memory capacity with an exceptionally large local SSD footprint on dedicated hardware. This configuration is designed to minimize latency and maximize throughput for I/O-intensive workloads. It is recommended for large-scale databases, data warehousing, big data analytics, and demanding storage applications that require massive local storage and high network throughput without the need for GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.16xlarge is a dedicated, storage-optimized server instance designed for high-throughput and data-intensive workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6763P-C processor running at 2.9 GHz, it delivers 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs on an x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per core, and features a massive 30,717 GB local SSD storage array. With a baseline network bandwidth of 160 Gbps and a KVM hypervisor, it provides high-speed data transfer and robust virtualization performance. This hardware profile is recommended for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and distributed file systems that require substantial local storage capacity and high network throughput.

tagline: A high-density storage and memory-optimized platform featuring massive local SSD capacity and high-speed baseline networking for data-intensive workloads.

512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
